label: Uranium Enrichment Level
contestNote: Iran maintains enrichment is for civilian energy; US/Israel/EU assess weapons-threshold ambiguity
deltaNote: Raised from 20% to 60% after JCPOA collapse; some material at 84%

label: Advanced Centrifuges Operating (IR-2m+)
contestNote: Iran disputes IAEA access and counts; exact operational figure uncertain

label: Population
source: Statistical Centre of Iran / World Bank 2024

label: Annual Inflation Rate
source: Statistical Centre of Iran / IMF World Economic Outlook 2024
deltaNote: Structural inflation driven by sanctions, currency collapse, oil revenue constraints

label: Frozen / Restricted Assets (Est.)
contestNote: Iran claims higher amounts illegally seized; US figures dispute some totals

label: Years of International Nuclear Standoff
source: IAEA — Natanz facility publicly revealed August 2002
deltaNote: Standoff began with 2002 revelation of undeclared enrichment facilities at Natanz and Arak
